Package microui

Class MicroUI

java.lang.Object
microui.MicroUI
public final class MicroUI extends Object
Core initialization and metadata class for the MicroUI library.

This singleton-style class provides the foundational setup for MicroUI components by establishing a connection to the Processing sketch context. Must be initialized before using any MicroUI functionality.

See Also:
  • setContext(PApplet)
  • getContext()

  • Method Details

    • setContext

      public static void setContext(processing.core.PApplet context)
      Initializes the MicroUI library with the current Processing sketch context.

      This method must be called once during sketch setup before any MicroUI components are used. Subsequent calls are silently ignored (idempotent operation). The context is typically the main sketch instance (this).

      Parameters:
      context - the main PApplet instance (typically this from the sketch)
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if context is null
      See Also:
      • getContext()

    • getContext

      public static processing.core.PApplet getContext()
      Returns the Processing sketch context for MicroUI.

      This method provides access to the initialized PApplet instance, which is required by MicroUI components for rendering and Processing API access.

      Returns:
      the initialized PApplet instance
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if setContext(PApplet) has not been called
      See Also:
      • setContext(PApplet)

    • getVersion

      public static String getVersion()
      Returns the current version of the MicroUI library.

      The version string follows semantic versioning (MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH). Useful for debugging, logging, or conditional code based on library features.

      Returns:
      the version string in format "MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH"
